title: pelargonium × eratinum
intro: Pelargonium × eratinum, a hybrid species of the pelargonium plant, is a flowering perennial plant that belongs to the geranium family and is native to South Africa. It is commonly known as 'Trailing Silver Fountain' and is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects that can help to soothe digestive issues and wounds. The health benefits of Pelargonium × eratinum include reducing stress and anxiety, alleviating symptoms of colds and flu, and promoting a good night's sleep. The herbal preparations of this plant include tea infusions, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
